## Security Disclosure

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, do not open a public issue.
Please report it privately by email to: **security@stellartrustescrow.dev**

## Summary

<!-- Describe the vulnerability clearly and concisely. -->

## Affected Contracts / Crates

- [ ] escrow_contract
- [ ] escrow_extensions
- [ ] governance
- [ ] backend
- [ ] frontend

## Impact

<!-- What is the potential impact if this issue is exploited? -->

## Reproduction Steps

<!-- Include any PoC, logs, or transaction data needed to reproduce. -->

## Suggested Remediation

<!-- If you have ideas for a fix, describe them here. -->

## Contact

- Email: **security@stellartrustescrow.dev**
- Please do not post exploit details publicly until the issue has been coordinated with maintainers.
